subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed by the All-Merciful in truth, and verily it is a perspicuous Book that speaketh the truth: There is none other God but I, the All-Forgiving, the All-Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن بالحق و انه لکتاب مبین ینطق بالحق انه لا اله الا انا الغفور الکریم
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
